title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

notes: Runs perfectly. No extra configuration needed.
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

cpu: AMD A10-7850K Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
notes:
6 hours played.
The game gets stuck if it is on fullscreen mode and loses focus on the window. Playing it on borderless mode is recommended.
The game was stuck in blackscreen after trying to load a new area and a second time after a cutscene. Both of them did not happen next time.
The FPS went down to about 20 during some areas. A restart fixed it.
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

notes: Full playthrough with Steam controller, 74 hours, with no tweaks. 1080p 60fps on medium settings. There were two or three areas with some stuttering, but otherwise very solid performance. Higher graphical settings stuttered trying to run at 60fps, so I left it on medium settings since the game looked fine anyway.
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

notes:
Installed the game, played the game on highest settings, finished the game after 67 hours.
Not a single issue.
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

notes: Played for 31 hours and beat the game without a single issue. Performance was great, no tweaks required.
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3550H with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
title: FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE

notes:
Cutscenes at default settings ran twice the speed they should of and caused audio de-sync. Had to disable v-sync which apparently can only be disabled via GameSetting.ini. Screen refresh rate is 144 and cutscenes look like they run at 30 FPS normally so would explain the double speed.
Location for GameSetting.ini for me:
/home/(usernamehere)/.local/share/Steam/steamapps/compatdata/595520/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My Documents/My Games/FINAL FANTASY XII THE ZODIAC AGE/ȁ/GameSetting.ini
